CONTENT.Honours: Íþróttabandalag Akraness1. deild karla: 2018Icelandic League Cup runner-up: 2019
CONTENT.Club career: Bjarki made his debut for Afturelding in a 3–1 win against Völsungur on 15 July 2017. On 6 December 2017, he joined ÍA and played there for three years. On 21 August 2020, he joined Venezia.On 14 January 2022, he joined Serie C club Catanzaro on loan until the end of the season.Upon his return from loan, Bjarki did not make any league appearances for Venezia in the first half of the 2022–23 season, playing in one Coppa Italia game. On 20 January 2023, he was loaned to Serie C club Foggia.
CONTENT.Personal life: His father is former international handballer, Bjarki Sigurðsson.
CONTENT.External links: Bjarki Steinn Bjarkason at SoccerwayBjarki Steinn Bjarkason at the Football Association of Iceland (in Icelandic)

SUMMARY: Bjarki Steinn Bjarkason (born 11 May 2000) is an Icelandic professional footballer who plays as a winger for Italian Serie A club Venezia.
